name: One Dish Chicken & Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Pepperidge Farm herb seasoned stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the stuffing, 1 cup boiling water, and 1 tablespoon margarine in a bowl.
2. Spoon the stuffing mixture across the center of a 3-quart shallow baking dish.
3. Place the chicken halves on each side of the stuffing.
4. Sprinkle the chicken with paprika.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the cream of mushroom soup, milk, and chopped parsley.
6. Pour the soup mixture over the chicken.
7. Cover the dish and bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
8. Uncover the dish and bake an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
For more moist stuffing, increase the amount of boiling water by 1 to 2 tablespoons.
Prep time: 10 mins. Cook time: 30 mins. Yield: 6 servings.
